justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified and processed all valid temporal expressions, including the initial invalid one and subsequent specific date and time requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check other times on the same day or a different day, but did not proactively suggest alternative available slots.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had one slightly redundant API call in the first turn by checking for appointment topics and contact mediums when the user clearly specified them.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent maintained a polite and helpful tone throughout the conversation, effectively guiding the user despite multiple changes in their availability.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent consistently maintained context and accurately processed new date and time requests after each rejection or unavailability, without losing any previously provided information.
